# Example Agent: Website Content Editor

This is a sample custom agent definition for the Confluentics corporate website.

It is intended as an example of how to structure a workspace-level agent.

## What it helps with
- Rewriting website copy to match the brand voice
- Improving SEO metadata and open graph tags
- Updating page structure and content sections in HTML files
- Reviewing text for clarity, consistency, and accessibility

## How to use
Ask the agent to edit website content or structure, for example:
- "Update the homepage hero section to better explain the service."
- "Improve the SEO description and title for the main page."
- "Make the messaging more concise and action-oriented."
